name: [PDF] Depth Map Decomposition for Monocular Depth Estimation - ECVA
snippet: Abstract. We propose a novel algorithm for monocular depth estima- tion that decomposes a metric depth map into a normalized depth map and scale features.

name: Methods for depth-map filtering in view-plus-depth 3D video
snippet: In this article, we study the problem of post-processing of depth maps degraded by improper estimation or by block-transform-based compression.
